printed.name: Side Arm Kneeling
printed.setup: Kneeling side in front of Wunda Chair, legs parallel, hip width apart, trunk in lateral flexion, head rotated, eyes focused down, inside arm straight, hand placed on pedal, palm facing down, fingers forward, outside arm overhead, internally rotated, elbow slightly bent, palm facing up

movement.exhale: Straigten arm, lowering pedal, return to start position

cues: Keep long line of outside arm and wrist consistent
Direct elbow back when bending and straightening arm
